plugins.name: ielts-reading-review
plugins.description: IELTS Academic Reading review skill — per-question error analysis (12 categories), synonym tracking, vocabulary tagging (538 keywords + COCA 5000), recurring mistake detection, fill-in-the-blank readback checklist, per-question-type progress trends, score-to-band conversion, per-passage timing, cumulative progress statistics, batch import historical scores, multi-user cloud sync, professional HTML review notes with PDF export. 雅思阅读复盘助手：12类错因分析、同义替换积累、考点词标注、易错模式追踪、填空回填检查、题型进步趋势、打分换算、进步统计、历史数据批量导入、多用户云同步。
